name: Pineapple Fried Rice
instructions:
1. If using fresh pineapple, cut it in half, scoop out the flesh, and dice it. Reserve the hollowed pineapple halves for serving (optional).

2. Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat. Add the shrimp and stir-fry for 2 minutes until pink. Remove and set aside.

3. In the same wok, add a little more oil. Scramble the eggs quickly, breaking them into small pieces.

4. Add the cooked rice, breaking up any clumps. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.

5. Add the pineapple, peas, diced carrots, and soy sauce. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.

6. Return the shrimp to the wok. Add green onions and toss everything together.

7. Season with salt and white pepper. Serve in the hollowed pineapple halves or a bowl, garnished with cilantro.
simpleInstructions:
1. Dice pineapple; cook shrimp until pink, set aside.

2. Scramble eggs in oil.

3. Add rice, stir-fry 3-4 minutes.

4. Add pineapple, veggies, soy sauce.

5. Return shrimp, add green onions.

6. Season and serve with cilantro.
